name: create_template
description: Create a reusable signing template from a document. Templates allow you to define signer roles, form fields, and merge fields once, then send multiple signature requests using the same structure. You must provide at least one file and define signer roles (e.g., 'Client', 'Manager'). The template is created asynchronously and the response includes a template_id and an edit_url where you can finalize the template layout in the HelloSign UI.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the template, visible when selecting templates.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Default subject line for signature requests created from this template.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Default message body for signature requests created from this template.

parameters.name: signer_roles
parameters.description: Array of signer role objects, each with a 'name' (e.g., 'Client', 'Manager') and optional 'order' for signing sequence.

parameters.name: file_urls
parameters.description: Array of URLs pointing to documents to use as the template base. At least one of file_urls or files is required.

parameters.name: merge_fields
parameters.description: Array of merge field objects with 'name' and 'type' (text or checkbox) that can be pre-filled when sending.

parameters.name: test_mode
parameters.description: Set to true to create in test mode. Default: false.

body.title: Standard NDA
body.subject: Non-Disclosure Agreement
body.message: Please review and sign this NDA.

template.title: Standard NDA
template.message: Please review and sign this NDA.
